title: No Enchants
body:
No Enchants is a simple and lightweight resource pack that removes the animated purple "glint" from enchanted items, tools, and armor.

**Features:**

*   Removes the enchantment glint entirely.
*   Works on all items, weapons, tools, and armor.
*   Perfect for PvP, building, or anyone who prefers a cleaner look.
*   Super light, zero lag.
*   Works with all other resource packs (just place this one on top in the load order).
*   FPS booster.

**Note:** This is purely visual, your items are still enchanted and function normally.

[![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/f92b1acb-4352-4682-8a43-5adca718e6bd.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/nikinok)
